assertions.title: Environment was cleaned up before baseline

steps.action: Inspect mission worker transcript for cleanup execution markers
steps.expected: Evidence of stale process/container cleanup before experiment start
steps.observed: Transcript contains killed stale PIDs, cleanup confirmation, and "Cleanup done, proceeding to experiments immediately"

commands: python3 evidence extraction script for assigned assertions

assertions.title: Baseline experiment ran with meaningful data

steps.expected: At least 10 step records in baseline output

commands: python3 scan of infer.log step_timing counts

assertions.title: Network capture collected data during experiment
Strace collected syscall data during experiment

steps.expected: Strace file exists with syscall/network evidence during gap period

commands: grep-like syscall extraction via python3 (connect + epoll evidence)

assertions.title: Instrumentation produced data during baseline experiment

steps.action: Verify instrumentation records in baseline log /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench/outputs/nvidia-bedrock-claude-sonnet-4-6/claude_code-2.0.51_default_implementer_none_20260401T2136/file_backup/infer.log

frictions.description: Cleanup evidence is embedded in worker transcript text, not emitted as a dedicated cleanup log artifact.
frictions.resolution: Captured transcript snippet with explicit cleanup completion marker and killed PID evidence.

frictions.description: No explicit "baseline" label in output directory names; baseline had to be identified by timestamped infer.log contents and step_timing counts.
frictions.resolution: Selected instrumented run with 11 step_timing events and recorded path in evidence summary.
